category_sources: Official GNU groff page describes groff as GNU roff, a typesetting system for PostScript, PDF, HTML, DVI, and terminal output.
display_name_sources: Official GNU project page is for groff/GNU troff.
docs_sources: Official GNU groff project page lists documentation and links the online GNU troff manual.
Official GNU-hosted manual is the dedicated online manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official GNU groff page, which points contributors to groff's Savannah Git repository.
tags_sources: Official GNU groff page describes groff's typesetting role and Unix manual-page association.
source_facts.description identifies GNU troff text formatting.
